nasb.text: Then you shall set your face toward the siege of Jerusalem with your arm bared and prophesy against it.

esv.text: And you shall set your face toward the siege of Jerusalem, with your arm bared, and you shall prophesy against the city.

cnv.text: 你要面向著被圍困的耶路撒冷，赤露著膀臂，說預言攻擊這城。

ccb.text: 你要面向被围困的耶路撒冷，光着臂膀说预言斥责这城。
